productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes White Shirt
description: Composition Purple and white striped shirt, made of a cotton blend fabric, has half sleeves, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Nuvo Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Designed for the confident executive and crafted from a cotton blend fabric to offer wrinkle-free comfort, this striped formal shirt from peter england is stitched to perfection offering exemplary comfort. Pair it with crisp formals, classy accessories and rich leather formal shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
